mapper.sql: id, part_code, sn, chip_uid, constant_type, kms_provider, kms_key_ref, key_spec, algorithm, preset_state, gen_time, last_attempt_time, fail_reason, batch_num, create_time, update_time, deleted
mapper.update:
UPDATE tb_part_security_constant t SET
t.part_code = #{partCode},
t.sn = #{sn},
t.chip_uid = #{chipUid},
t.constant_type = #{constantType},
t.kms_provider = #{kmsProvider},
t.kms_key_ref = #{kmsKeyRef},
t.key_spec = #{keySpec},
t.algorithm = #{algorithm},
t.preset_state = #{presetState},
t.gen_time = #{genTime},
t.last_attempt_time = #{lastAttemptTime},
t.fail_reason = #{failReason},
t.batch_num = #{batchNum},
t.update_time = now() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_part_security_constant t SET t.deleted = 1, t.update_time = now() WHERE t.id = #{value}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM tb_part_security_constant t WHERE t.id = #{value}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM tb_part_security_constant t WHERE t.id = #{value} AND t.deleted = 0

SELECT FROM tb_part_security_constant t WHERE t.deleted = 0
ORDER BY t.id DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_part_security_constant t WHERE t.deleted = 0
